CustomField.formula: CASE( Text(Linea_de_Proyecto__r.Oportunidad__r.StageName), "Prior Information", "Preliminary Information", "Identificada", "Identified", "Solicitada", "Requested", "Team Analysis", "Team Analysis", "Preventa", "Pre-sales", "Entregada", "Delivered", "Submitted", "Submitted", "Under preparation", "Under Preparation", "Presentada", "Presented", "Ganada", "Won", "Perdida", "Lost", "Cancelada", "Cancelled", "Finalizada", "Completed", "Pendiente Aprobacion", "Pending Approval", "Unknown" )
CustomField.label: Etapa
